Count the number of lines found in Oracle

Number of lines in Area Santé is equal
to the number of lines in Oracle
Count of Oracle is greater than the count of Area Santé

With the next payment line

Is a next payment line available ?
(Counter of treated lines = total lines)

Add a "Status" empty column
(Text format : can be Duplicated, To analyze, Amended, Reconcilied, To book, Data error, Ignored)
Send a success email with Excel file in attachement

Duplicate the Excel sheet into the created Excel file
and rename it as as "Area Sante"
Store the current time in the "Start time" column
Display a successful pop-up
Click on the "Run" button

Check the format of the source file
(consistency, order of columns and number of lines)
Is the number of lines until last save is reached ?
Yes, the limit has been reached
Not yet, the number of lines is under the limit
Save the Excel file
Yes, there is a next line to treat
No, the Excel file is ended
E N D
S T A R T

Build a Pivot table report
in a new sheet named "Execution report"

Update the "Status" column with "Reconciled"
for all lines having the same "Duplicate key"

Update the "Status" column with "Duplicated"
for all lines having the same "Duplicate key"

No at least one these columns are missing
or not correctly formrmatted
Yes, the 3 columns are correctly filled

Number of lines in Area Santé is different
to the number of lines in Oracle
Go back to the previous search page

Change the the "Entered Amount" field
as less than the "Amount" Excel column

Click on the Search button

Click on the receipt number of the line
No line found
1 line found
Count the number of lines found in Oracle
Identify the first amount from the History tab
Identify the most recent amount from the HIstory tab

Calculate the remaining time
(Last execution time * (Total lines - Treated lines) )
Store the current time in the "End time" column
Increase by one the counter of treated lines

Calculate the execution time for the last treated line
(End time - Start time)
Update the remaining time in the UI
Update the counter of treated lines in the UI
Update the progress percentage in the UI

Calculate the progress percentage
(Treated lines / Total lines) * 100
Save the Excel file

Skip to the next payment line
(Line to be manually analyzed)
Update the "Status" column with "Data error"
No at least one of the column is missing, not at correct place, or the number of lines is incorrect
Yes, all the columns are present and at correct place and there is lines inside the Excel file
Save the Excel file

Create a new empty Excel file in Sharepoint with naming
"RPA_AR_booking_DD-MM-AAAA_HH-MM"
Rename the current Excel sheet as "Logs"
Duplicate the "Area Santé" sheet as "RPA" sheet

Select the "Oracle Customer N°" Excel file
Add the "Date", "Time", "Level" and "Log" columns
Open the newly created Excel file
Add a pre-filtering of all columns and freeze the first row
Open the "Area Santé" Excel source file
From this step all next actions must be logged into the Excel file
Send a failure email with Excel file in attachement
Display a failure pop-up
Stop the run of the RPA
Save the Excel file
Add a pre-filtering of all columns and freeze the first row
Close the "Area Santé" Excel source file

and rename it as as "Oracle Client"

(consistency, order of columns and number of lines)

Send a failure email with Excel file in attachement
Display a failure pop-up
Stop the run of the RPA
Save the Excel file
